# The Growth Marketer's Guide to Education - Iterable

## The Growth Marketer’s Guide to Education

We’ve examined the universal problems that all education marketers are facing at their respective institutions—maximizing new student enrollment and alumni donations.

Download our education-focused guide to learn how to start designing the immersive marketing strategy that aligns and coordinates messages to prospective students and donors at all the right moments.

**Here’s what you’ll find inside:**

*   How old marketing technologies are negating education marketers
*   Why you should upgrade your marketing stack
*   The value behind omni-channel relevance from the educational marketer’s perspective
